Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class CustomFieldTranslation

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.CustomFieldTranslation
public class CustomFieldTranslation extends Object

Java class for CustomFieldTranslation complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CustomFieldTranslation">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="caseValues" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ObjectNameCaseValue" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="gender" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Gender" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="help" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lookupFilter" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}LookupFilterTranslation" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="picklistValues" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}PicklistValueTranslation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="relationshipLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="startsWith" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}StartsWith" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getCaseValues

      public List<ObjectNameCaseValue> getCaseValues()
      Gets the value of the caseValues property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the caseValues property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getCaseValues().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ObjectNameCaseValue

      Returns:
      The value of the caseValues property.

    • getGender

      public Gender getGender()
      Gets the value of the gender property.
      Returns:
      possible object is Gender

    • getPicklistValues

      public List<PicklistValueTranslation> getPicklistValues()
      Gets the value of the picklistValues property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the picklistValues property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getPicklistValues().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list PicklistValueTranslation

      Returns:
      The value of the picklistValues property.
